---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction Steps

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 20.11.0]
- **PostgreSQL Version**: [e.g. 15.4]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 125, Firefox 126]
- **AgoraX Version**: [e.g. 0.1.0]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Logs

If applicable, add log output to help explain your problem.

```log
Paste logs here
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have included steps to reproduce the bug
- [ ] I have included my environment information
- [ ] I have included relevant logs or screenshots
